entities.name: BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of life in the world or in a particular habitat or ecosystem, attracting global attention through initiatives.

entities.name: NEGLECTED AND UNDERUTILIZED SPECIES
entities.description: Plant species that are not widely used or are neglected in mainstream agriculture, targeted for popularization.

entities.name: SMART FOOD INITIATIVE
entities.description: An initiative focused on mainstreaming specific neglected and underutilized species to diversify staples.

entities.name: STAPLES
entities.description: Crops that typically make up the dominant part of a population's diet, often around 70% of the plate.

entities.name: SMART FOODS
entities.description: Foods that fulfill the criteria of being nutritious and healthy, environmentally sustainable, and beneficial for producers.

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The quality of being nutritious and healthy for the consumer.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The quality of being good for the planet and environmentally sustainable.

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers who manage small plots of land and subsist on their production, intended to benefit from smart foods.

entities.name: SMART FOOD TRIPLE BOTTOM LINE
entities.description: A premise that food solutions should simultaneously satisfy criteria for the consumer, the planet, and the farmer.
